## Summary
Brief description of what changed and why.

How was this verified? Include steps, screenshots, or test output.

## Checklist
- [ ] Project builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tested in an Azure DevOps organization
- [ ] Updated documentation where applicable
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or organization-specific data introduced
